top_critical.title: CVE-2026-48908: JoomShaper SP Page Builder RCE Flaw
top_critical.summary: A critical vulnerability in the JoomShaper SP Page Builder plugin for Joomla allows unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files, including malicious PHP scripts, which can then be executed on
top_critical.architects_take: Any internet-facing Joomla instance running SP Page Builder should be patched immediately or taken offline; additionally, review web server configurations to ensure uploaded file directories are non-executable, and implement a web application firewall (WAF) rule to block unauthenticated file upload requests as an interim control.
